special_mechanics.name: No Jump Button
special_mechanics.description: Unlike similar platformers of the era, Popeye has no dedicated jump button. Movement is controlled via 4-way joystick for walking back/forth and traversing stairs and ladders.

special_mechanics.name: Punch Mechanic
special_mechanics.description: Popeye can punch to destroy harmful items such as bottles, vultures, and skulls.

special_mechanics.name: Spinach Power-up
special_mechanics.description: Eating spinach makes Popeye invincible for a short duration, during which he can knock out Brutus by running into him. Also doubles point value of collected items.

special_mechanics.name: Climbing
special_mechanics.description: Popeye can traverse stairs and ladders using 4-way joystick control.

tier_notes: Tier 2 designation appropriate. Available sources contain only high-level gameplay descriptions and design history. No technical physics documentation found regarding movement speeds, gravity values, acceleration, or sub-pixel systems. Sources focus on game design, ports, and critical reception rather than movement mechanics.
